channel.title: Economics on Ugur's Personal Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Economics on Ugur's Personal Blog

item.title: The Solow Paradox Returns: Why AI's Productivity Promise Feels Like a Ghost
item.description: We're told AI will transform productivity. But the numbers say otherwise. And we're repeating history.

item.title: When Intelligence Gets Cheaper, We Dream Bigger
item.description: As AI becomes more efficient, we use it more—not less. The Jevons Paradox applied to intelligence raises uncomfortable questions about what we actually want from thinking machines.
